Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.ResponseProcessor

Packages that use ResponseProcessor
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor
HTTP Response Processors
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive
Reactive-Streams return-type support for @RestOp handlers (opt-in, dependency-free).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing
Tracing SPI for juneau-rest-server — per-request span hook backed by a caller-supplied TracerHook bean.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
Engine-agnostic server-side-rendered view extension point.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.

  • Uses of ResponseProcessor in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return ResponseProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ResponseProcessor[]
    RestContext.getResponseProcessors()
    Returns the response processors registered on this resource.

  • Uses of ResponseProcessor in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor

    Subinterfaces of ResponseProcessor in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    CatchAllResponseProcessor
    Marker interface for response processors that act as catch-alls — i.e. processors that accept any non-null return value when no more-specific processor matches.
    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor that implement ResponseProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AsyncResponseProcessor
    Response processor that unwraps CompletableFuture / CompletionStage return values from @RestOp-annotated methods and bridges them to the servlet container's asynchronous request lifecycle.
    class 
    HttpBodyProcessor
    Response handler for HttpBody objects (transport-neutral replacement for the historical Apache HttpClient 4.5 HttpEntity-keyed processor).
    class 
    HttpResourceProcessor
    Response handler for HttpResource objects.
    class 
    HttpResponseProcessor
    Response handler for HttpResponseMessage objects (transport-neutral replacement for HttpResponse).
    class 
    InputStreamProcessor
    Response processor for InputStream objects.
    class 
    PlainTextPojoProcessor
    Response handler for plain-old Java objects when a serializer match is not found and they're asking for plain/text or anything.
    class 
    ProblemDetailsProcessor
    Response processor that serializes RFC 7807 / 9457 Problem payloads as application/problem+json.
    class 
    ReaderProcessor
    Response processor for Reader objects.
    class 
    ResponseBeanProcessor
    Response handler for @Response-annotated objects.
    class 
    SerializedPojoProcessor
    Response handler for plain-old Java objects.
    class 
    ThrowableProcessor
    Response handler for Throwable objects.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor that return ResponseProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ResponseProcessor[]
    ResponseProcessorList.toArray()
    Returns the entries in this list.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor with parameters of type ResponseProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ResponseProcessorList.Builder
    ResponseProcessorList.Builder.add(ResponseProcessor... values)
    Appends the specified rest response processor objects to the list.

  • Uses of ResponseProcessor in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive that implement ResponseProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ReactiveResponseProcessor
    Response processor that bridges Reactive Streams return values from @RestOp handlers to Juneau's response pipeline.

  • Uses of ResponseProcessor in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing that implement ResponseProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TraceContextResponseProcessor
    Writes the W3C Trace Context response headers (traceparent and, when present, tracestate) so a client calling this server can read the resulting trace identifiers back off the response.

  • Uses of ResponseProcessor in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view

    Subinterfaces of ResponseProcessor in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ViewRenderer
    Marker interface for response processors that handle View-typed return values.

  • Uses of ResponseProcessor in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker that implement ResponseProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FreemarkerViewRenderer
    ResponseProcessor that detects FreemarkerView-typed return values and asks the configured Configuration to render them directly onto the response writer.

  • Uses of ResponseProcessor in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp that implement ResponseProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JspViewRenderer
    ResponseProcessor that detects JspView-typed return values and dispatches them to the underlying JSP engine via ServletContext.getRequestDispatcher(...).forward(...).

  • Uses of ResponseProcessor in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache that implement ResponseProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MustacheViewRenderer
    ResponseProcessor that detects MustacheView-typed return values and asks the configured MustacheFactory to render them directly onto the response writer.

  • Uses of ResponseProcessor in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf that implement ResponseProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ThymeleafViewRenderer
    ResponseProcessor that detects ThymeleafView-typed return values and asks the configured TemplateEngine to render them directly onto the response writer.
